title: Batlle royal
description: This mod was created in the likeness of the plug-in of the SpeedSilver youtuber of the same name, I hope my mod will someday be noticed by SpeedSilver (If you use the mod, then leave a link to the mod and do not assign it to yourself!)
body:
# ⚔ Battle Royale Mod — A New Era of PvP Combat in Minecraft!

Battle Royale Mod is a Forge-exclusive Minecraft mod that introduces unique PvP mechanics. Instead of standard combat with ordinary weapons, players gain access to powerful 3D swords with special abilities and can enhance themselves by collecting extra hearts dropped from defeated enemies.

This is just the first version of the mod, but it will continue to evolve, bringing new mechanics, weapons, and features to make battles even more exciting!


---

# 🔥 Key Features

 Unique 3D Swords — powerful weapons with special effects that change combat dynamics.

 Extra Hearts — when an enemy is defeated, they drop a heart that can be used to increase your maximum health.

 Craftable Materials — all key items can be crafted by gathering the necessary resources.

 Forge Support — this mod works exclusively with Forge, ensuring stability and compatibility with other mods.



---

# 🎯 Why Did I Create This Mod?

 I wanted to make Minecraft PvP more dynamic and strategic by introducing new weapons and a power-up system. This mod is perfect for both single-player and server battles, offering a fresh combat experience for PvP enthusiasts.

Battle Royale Mod is just the beginning. Future updates will bring more weapons, abilities, and mechanics, making fights even more thrilling!


---

# 📥 Installation

 1. Install Forge Loader.


 2. Move the Battle Royale Mod file into the mods folder.


3. Launch the game and enjoy the new PvP mechanics!



🔹 Stay tuned for updates — more weapons, enhancements, and gameplay features are on the way!
